entries.description: A CLI that records the decisions behind code (rationale, rejected alternatives, assumptions/invariants, the original instruction) alongside Git, so AI agents can reconstruct context across sessions and multi-agent hand-offs. JSON in/out, no daemon, SQLite-backed. The url points to the agent skill doc covering install and usage.
representativeQueries: record the rationale and rejected alternatives behind a code change
find out why a function was written the way it is across past sessions
reconstruct decision context after a multi-agent hand-off
log invariants and assumptions alongside git commits
